user.title: Binary MoIP
user.description: Connect to your Binary MoIP controller.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller.

zones.title: Zones
zones.description: Uncheck a zone to hide it from Home Assistant; type a custom name to rename it. Blank keeps the controller's name.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Uncheck a source to hide it from the source list; type a custom name to rename it. Blank keeps the synthesized name.
